# AUTO-GENERATED by `artheia gen-app` — DO NOT EDIT.
# source: odd_path_client/system/components/odd_path_monitor.art

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(odd_path_client CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 14)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

# pero_cmp_lnx provides the runtime + transport. Set PERO_CMP_LNX to the
# checkout path (defaults to the workspace layout).
set(PERO_CMP_LNX "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/../../gateway/libs/pero_cmp_lnx" CACHE PATH
    "Path to pero_cmp_lnx (LifecycleInterface, runtime, transport).")

# AUTOSAR PSP supplies nanopb message structs for the PDUs we consume.
set(PSP_ROOT "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/../../autosar/mlbevo_gen2_cmp_psp" CACHE PATH
    "Path to the MLBevo PSP (nanopb structs + dispatch tables).")

add_executable(odd_path_client
    app/OddPathMonitor.cc
    app/OddPathMonitor_main.cc
    app/impl/OddPathMonitor_handlers.cc
    
)

target_include_directories(odd_path_client PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/core
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/app
    ${PERO_CMP_LNX}/lib/include
    ${PSP_ROOT}/proto/shared
    
)

# Runtime libs from pero_cmp_lnx (cmpdecoder + gw).
find_library(PERO_CMPDECODER NAMES cmpdecoder PATHS ${PERO_CMP_LNX}/build ${PERO_CMP_LNX}/lib)
find_library(PERO_GW         NAMES gw         PATHS ${PERO_CMP_LNX}/build ${PERO_CMP_LNX}/lib)
target_link_libraries(odd_path_client PRIVATE ${PERO_CMPDECODER} ${PERO_GW})
